data.name: Page_Description_Anchor
data.value: Anchor provides a table of contents navigation linked to page sections.

data.name: Page_Description_AspectRatioLayout
data.value: AspectRatioLayout maintains a fixed aspect ratio for its child content.

data.name: Page_Description_AutoCompleteBox
data.value: AutoCompleteBox provides suggestions as the user types in a text field.

data.name: Page_Description_Avatar
data.value: Avatar displays a user profile image or initials in a circular container.

data.name: Page_Description_Badge
data.value: Badge displays a small count or status indicator on another element.

data.name: Page_Description_Banner
data.value: Banner displays a prominent informational or alert message bar.

data.name: Page_Description_Breadcrumb
data.value: Breadcrumb displays a navigation trail showing the current page location.

data.name: Page_Description_ButtonGroup
data.value: A ButtonGroup is a control that groups multiple buttons together.

data.name: Page_Description_ClassInput
data.value: ClassInput allows users to input CSS class names interactively.

data.name: Page_Description_Clock
data.value: Clock displays a visual analog or digital clock.

data.name: Page_Description_DateOffsetPicker
data.value: DateOffsetPicker selects a date with timezone offset support.

data.name: Page_Description_DateOffsetRangePicker
data.value: DateOffsetRangePicker selects a date range with timezone offset support.

data.name: Page_Description_DateOnlyPicker
data.value: DateOnlyPicker is a date picker that works with the DateOnly type.

data.name: Page_Description_DateOnlyRangePicker
data.value: DateOnlyRangePicker selects a date range using the DateOnly type.

data.name: Page_Description_DatePicker
data.value: DatePicker allows users to select a date from a calendar popup.

data.name: Page_Description_DateRangePicker
data.value: DateRangePicker allows selecting a start and end date range.

data.name: Page_Description_DateTimeOffsetPicker
data.value: DateTimeOffsetPicker selects a DateTimeOffset including timezone information.

data.name: Page_Description_DateTimePicker
data.value: DateTimePicker allows selecting both date and time values.

data.name: Page_Description_Descriptions
data.value: Descriptions presents key-value data in a structured label-content layout.

data.name: Page_Description_DisableContainer
data.value: DisableContainer wraps content to visually and functionally disable child elements.

data.name: Page_Description_Divider
data.value: Divider renders a horizontal or vertical separator line between content.

data.name: Page_Description_Drawer
data.value: Drawer is a panel that slides in from the edge of the screen.

data.name: Page_Description_DualBadge
data.value: DualBadge shows a two-part badge with header and value sections.

data.name: Page_Description_ElasticWrapPanel
data.value: ElasticWrapPanel is a panel that wraps children with elastic spacing distribution.

data.name: Page_Description_EnumSelector
data.value: EnumSelector provides a dropdown for selecting enum values.

data.name: Page_Description_Form
data.value: Form is a layout container for grouping labeled input controls.

data.name: Page_Description_GroupBox
data.value: GroupBox groups related controls together with an optional title border.

data.name: Page_Description_IconButton
data.value: IconButton is a button that displays an icon alongside optional text.

data.name: Page_Description_ImageViewer
data.value: ImageViewer displays images with pan, zoom, and fit-to-window capabilities.

data.name: Page_Description_IPv4Box
data.value: IPv4Box is a specialized input for entering IPv4 addresses.

data.name: Page_Description_KeyGestureInput
data.value: KeyGestureInput captures keyboard shortcut gestures from user input.

data.name: Page_Description_Loading
data.value: Loading displays a spinner or progress indicator during async operations.

data.name: Page_Description_Marquee
data.value: Marquee scrolls text or content continuously in a horizontal direction.

data.name: Page_Description_MarkdownLine
data.value: A lightweight TextBlock that renders a limited subset of inline Markdown formatting.

data.name: Page_Description_MessageBox
data.value: MessageBox shows a modal dialog with a message and action buttons.

data.name: Page_Description_MultiAutoCompleteBox
data.value: MultiAutoCompleteBox supports selecting multiple items with auto-complete suggestions.

data.name: Page_Description_MultiComboBox
data.value: MultiComboBox allows selecting multiple items from a dropdown list.

data.name: Page_Description_NavMenu
data.value: NavMenu is a vertical or horizontal navigation menu with hierarchical items.

data.name: Page_Description_Notification
data.value: Notification shows informational messages in a non-blocking overlay.

data.name: Page_Description_NumberDisplayer
data.value: NumberDisplayer animates number transitions with smooth digit rolling effects.

data.name: Page_Description_NumericUpDown
data.value: NumericUpDown is a numeric input control with increment and decrement buttons.

data.name: Page_Description_NumPad
data.value: NumPad is a numeric keypad control for entering numbers.

data.name: Page_Description_OverlayDialog
data.value: Overlay Dialog displays dialogs as overlays within the application window.

data.name: Page_Description_Pagination
data.value: Pagination provides controls to navigate between pages of content.

data.name: Page_Description_PathPicker
data.value: PathPicker allows users to select file or folder paths from the filesystem.

data.name: Page_Description_PinCode
data.value: PinCode is an input control for entering PIN or verification codes.

data.name: Page_Description_PopConfirm
data.value: PopConfirm shows a confirmation popup before executing an action.

data.name: Page_Description_ProportionalCanvas
data.value: ProportionalCanvas is a layout panel that arranges child elements proportionally within the available space.

data.name: Page_Description_QrCode
data.value: QrCode generates and displays QR code images from text or URL input.

data.name: Page_Description_RangeSlider
data.value: RangeSlider allows selecting a value range with two draggable thumbs.

data.name: Page_Description_Rating
data.value: Rating displays and collects star-based rating values from users.

data.name: Page_Description_ScrollToButton
data.value: ScrollToButton is a floating button that scrolls the viewport to a target element.

data.name: Page_Description_SelectionList
data.value: SelectionList presents a list of items for single or multiple selection.

data.name: Page_Description_Skeleton
data.value: Skeleton shows placeholder loading animations for content areas.

data.name: Page_Description_TagInput
data.value: TagInput allows users to enter and manage multiple tag values.

data.name: Page_Description_ThemeToggler
data.value: ThemeToggler provides a control to switch between light and dark themes.

data.name: Page_Description_ThemeVariantMapper
data.value: ThemeVariantMapper maps values between light and dark theme variants.

data.name: Page_Description_TimeBox
data.value: TimeBox is a text input control for entering time values directly.

data.name: Page_Description_Timeline
data.value: Timeline presents a sequence of events in chronological vertical order.

data.name: Page_Description_TimeOnlyPicker
data.value: TimeOnlyPicker selects time values using the TimeOnly type.

data.name: Page_Description_TimeOnlyRangePicker
data.value: TimeOnlyRangePicker selects a time range using the TimeOnly type.

data.name: Page_Description_TimePicker
data.value: TimePicker allows selecting a time value from a popup panel.

data.name: Page_Description_TimeRangePicker
data.value: TimeRangePicker allows selecting a start and end time range.

data.name: Page_Description_Toast
data.value: Toast displays brief, auto-dismissing notification messages.

data.name: Page_Description_ToolBar
data.value: ToolBar is a container for grouping action buttons and controls.

data.name: Page_Description_TreeComboBox
data.value: TreeComboBox is a combo box that displays items in a hierarchical tree structure.

data.name: Page_Description_TwoTonePathIcon
data.value: TwoTonePathIcon renders path icons with two distinct fill colors.

data.name: Page_Description_VirtualizingUniformGrid
data.value: A virtualizing panel that arranges items in a uniform grid with a fixed number of columns. Only items that are currently visible (plus a buffer area) are realized; off-screen containers are recycled.

data.name: Page_Description_WindowDialog
data.value: Window Dialog displays modal windows for user interaction.
